snippet: This funding line supports small rural schools that require additional resources to reduce rural and urban school disparities. Funding is provided for eligible primary, secondary, and combined schools located in non-metropolitan and non-provincial locations so that these schools can deliver effective educational outcomes. Allocations are determined at campus level using a per student rate. The per student rate is split into credit and cash and accounts for payroll tax, superannuation, relief teaching and professional development. Campuses with the following campus type, enrolments and location are eligible for RSSAF funding. Funding is calculated at the Indicative, Confirmed and Revised budget cycles. Funding is allocated through credit and cash funding. Allocation = Primary enrolments × Primary per student rate + Secondary enrolments × Secondary per student rate
